lobby.directoryBlurb: Welcome to CloudZA, dankie for popping in! Grab a spot in the central lift bank and ride up to any of our team floors, or head to the Townhall for all-hands gatherings.

welcome.label: 📋 Welcome to CloudZA — Sign In & Say Hello

floors.tagline: Ship it, scale it, own it.
floors.floorDescription: The blue-lit Team Alpha floor where CloudZA's product and platform engineers turn ideas into shipping software, ringed by focus offices, a war room, and a coffee-fuelled breakout nook.

breakout.name: The Rooibos Lounge
breakout.blurb: Grab a cuppa, swap war stories, and rubber-duck your gnarliest bug with a teammate.

floors.tagline: Keep it up, keep it green.
floors.floorDescription: The green-lit Team Bravo floor where CloudZA's SRE crew keeps the platform humming, tames incidents, and turns 3am pages into boring dashboards.

breakout.name: The Green Room
breakout.blurb: Grab a rooibos, decompress after a deploy, and swap war stories where nothing is on fire.

noticeBoard.label: Bravo Ops Board — runbooks, on-call roster & incident retros

floors.floorDescription: The amber-lit Charlie floor where CloudZA's data and AI crew mine insight from noise, ship models, and keep the pipelines humming.

breakout.name: The Data Lake Lounge
breakout.blurb: Grab a coffee, dip into the data lake, and let your best ideas float to the surface.
